foundation: WORK DONE IN 2022, MIGHT NEED ADJUSTMENT
description: Welcome to your next Carrollton 3/2/2 brick 1972 build flip!! This property needs cosmetics and possibly a slight foundation adjustment (towards the back of the property). We are working on getting the foundation measured and plumbing tested to confirm everything is in good condition. Plumbing is PVC, and with the functional layout the property will fetch offers at 400's range depending on the finishes. Contact Ariel 8175659399.
